## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (added/updated tests where relevant)
- [ ] No new migrations missing (`makemigrations --check --dry-run`)
- [ ] Business logic kept in `services/` (views/models stay thin)
- [ ] Updated README / `.env.example` if settings or commands changed
